scope: repository-controlled tooling and verification mechanisms only; external certification evidence remains required
verdict: all repository-controlled verification mechanisms are represented by deterministic artifacts, commands, CI gates, or documented external-evidence slots

mechanisms.purpose: unit and integration tests for kernel state, APDU, TLV, ODA, CVM, TRM, TAA, issuer, C-8, and FFI behavior
compile and execute deterministic evidence generators and user-facing integration examples
enforce stable formatting, warnings-as-failures static linting, and whitespace cleanliness
prepare and audit a 100% coverage package with metadata before external report acceptance
mechanisms.ci_gate: Rust coverage report preparation; Certification coverage package audit smoke

mechanisms.purpose: generate and audit masked APDU trace fixtures with sensitive tag suppression and replay metadata
commands: cargo run --quiet --example krn_trace_pack_audit -- --path docs/prelab_apdu_trace_pack.jsonl --require-prelab-fixture | diff -u docs/prelab_trace_pack_audit.json -
cargo run --quiet --example krn_trace_pack_audit -- --path docs/prelab_apdu_trace_pack.jsonl --markdown | diff -u docs/prelab_trace_pack_audit.md -
mechanisms.ci_gate: Pre-lab trace pack drift; Pre-lab trace pack audit drift

mechanisms.purpose: define static-analysis gates, fuzz surfaces, deterministic seed corpus, and parser/APDU no-crash smoke evidence
mechanisms.ci_gate: Static and fuzz plan drift; Fuzz seed corpus drift; No-crash smoke artifact drift

mechanisms.purpose: emit ABI conformance and capability-readiness records without replacing signed lab templates
keep scheme, profile, CAPK, TAC/IAC, and other variable certification data outside compiled kernel code
mechanisms.ci_gate: Scheme profile dictionary drift; Variable data boundary audit

mechanisms.purpose: create, validate, fingerprint, and locally provision certification/testing data bundles so certification scope changes are represented as input data rather than Rust source edits
mechanisms.ci_gate: Data-driven certification bundle artifact drift; checked-in bundle validation; checked-in bundle lint; wizard smoke; example compile
mechanisms.external_closure_gate: CERT-OPEN-002; CERT-OPEN-003; CERT-OPEN-004; CERT-OPEN-005; CERT-OPEN-009; CERT-OPEN-012

mechanisms.purpose: ship first-class CLI commands, formal schemas, submission-pack assembly, C ABI headers, Python helpers, starter kits, and repeatable development containers for product teams
commands: cargo run --quiet --bin hyperion -- schemas write --out target/hyperion-schemas
cargo run --quiet --bin hyperion -- release freeze --artifacts target/hyperion-cert-artifact-import --out target/hyperion-submission-pack --allow-incomplete
mechanisms.ci_gate: CLI smoke; schema/header generation; release-freeze smoke; full verify target

mechanisms.purpose: record public standards-watch signals and require licensed/lab evidence before changing certification scope
mechanisms.external_closure_gate: CERT-OPEN-001; CERT-OPEN-005; CERT-OPEN-006; CERT-OPEN-007; CERT-OPEN-009; CERT-OPEN-011; CERT-OPEN-012

mechanisms.purpose: generate attachment checklists, intake ledgers, attachment hash audits, and supersession controls for external evidence
mechanisms.ci_gate: Certification evidence checklist drift; Certification evidence intake drift; Certification attachment audit smoke

mechanisms.purpose: classify, hash, reject unsafe containers, and normalize real lab, scheme, CAPK, vector, device, and report artifacts when they become available
mechanisms.ci_gate: Certification artifact import plan drift; artifact import, integration import, and release freeze smoke

mechanisms.purpose: capture submitted-build hash slots and canonical source/evidence provenance commands
commands: cargo run --quiet --example krn_build_manifest -- src Cargo.lock Cargo.toml .github/workflows/prelab.yml docs/spec.md docs/lab_submission_manifest.md docs/requirements_traceability.csv mechanisms.purpose: produce security assessment, device/L1/PED, and full integration-report control plans
mechanisms.external_closure_gate: CERT-OPEN-006; CERT-OPEN-007; CERT-OPEN-008; CERT-OPEN-009; CERT-OPEN-010; CERT-OPEN-012

mechanisms.purpose: generate the static report workbench, JSON/Markdown report pack, and complete local certification workspace
mechanisms.ci_gate: Certification report drift; Certification workspace smoke

mechanisms.purpose: run a basic scripted PoS flow and expose callback timeout policy for terminal adapter evidence
mechanisms.ci_gate: Basic PoS integration smoke; Callback timeout policy smoke

mechanisms.purpose: produce this audit so repository tooling gaps are machine-checkable and external blockers remain explicit

external_evidence_still_required.authority: EMVCo, scheme, acquirer, and recognized laboratory
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: final lab execution report plus signed approval or LoA-equivalent artifact for the claimed interface, kernel, and scheme scope
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: submitted binary hash, profile hash, test-tool package, device model, firmware, and claimed interface list
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: approval artifact agrees with the submitted binary, profile set, device scope, and RTM

external_evidence_still_required.authority: scheme, acquirer, or laboratory profile authority
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: signed AID, TAC/IAC, limit, CVM, CDA-control, and kernel-selection profile bundle
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: profile version, issuer authority, retrieval date, signature status, rollback policy, and SHA-256
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: signed profile bundle is loaded through the verified profile path and matches trace identity

external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: approved CAPK set with RID, key index, modulus, exponent, expiry, checksum, and provenance
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: CAPK source, retrieval date, expiry date, checksum, bundle hash, and approval reference
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: CAPK bundle passes repository checksum gates and traces to accepted public-key material

external_evidence_still_required.authority: recognized laboratory or scheme test-vector authority
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: complete lab-supplied SDA, DDA, and CDA cryptographic vectors with expected TVR/TSI and outcome data
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: vector class, vector source, tool version, expected outputs, method coverage, and bundle hash
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: docs/oda_test_vectors.json is replaced by vector_class CERTIFICATION and passes complete-vector validation
external_evidence_still_required.repository_support: src/oda.rs, docs/oda_test_vectors.json, ODA parser and validation tests

external_evidence_still_required.authority: EMVCo contactless kernel/product approval path and scheme profile authority
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: lab-selected C-8 version and bulletin reconciliation, profile data, contactless test-tool results, and outcome traces
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: C-8 version, bulletin set, included/excluded adjacent books, test-tool version, terminal profile, TTQ source, and trace pack hash
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: contactless claim is tied to the accepted C-8 package, profile set, device/L1 evidence, and masked outcome traces

external_evidence_still_required.authority: device vendor, L1 laboratory, scheme, and EMVCo process as applicable
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: target terminal, contact interface, contactless reader, firmware, and L1/device certification evidence
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: model, hardware revision, firmware, reader stack, L1 approval reference, and submitted binary/profile hash
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: device evidence names the same target, firmware, binary, profile bundle, and interface scope as the submission
external_evidence_still_required.repository_support: docs/lab_submission_manifest.md, trace identity metadata, C ABI integration examples

external_evidence_still_required.authority: PCI SSC, PCI-recognized laboratory, PED vendor, and security assessor
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: PCI PTS POI integration statement, PED-owned VERIFY evidence, and no-clear-PIN custody review
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: PTS listing or assessment reference, PED model, firmware, PIN method, opaque-handle policy, and integration evidence
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: PED evidence confirms the kernel only handles opaque PIN handles and cannot log or receive clear PIN data

external_evidence_still_required.authority: independent security assessor accepted for the product submission
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: penetration test and architecture review report covering APDU injection, state-machine bypass, trace leakage, and profile tampering
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: scope, commit hash, device/profile set, findings, remediations, residual-risk owner, and retest evidence
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: all critical/high findings are remediated or formally accepted before final certification-facing release

external_evidence_still_required.authority: submission owner, laboratory, scheme, or acquirer acceptance path
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: 100% unit coverage report plus coverage metadata JSON and full EMV test-plan integration report for the submitted build
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: source commit, Cargo version, Rust compiler version, target triple, feature set, cargo-llvm-cov version, threshold, enforcement mode, profile hash, CAPK hash, test-tool version, report hash, and deviations
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: coverage and integration reports match the submitted binary, profiles, CAPKs, vectors, and annex hashes

external_evidence_still_required.authority: submission owner, laboratory, scheme, or acquirer acceptance path
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: accepted static-analysis report and fuzzing/no-crash report with findings and dispositions
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: tool versions, commands, sanitizer set, corpus hashes, run budget, crashes, remediations, and accepted residual risks
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: reports show no unresolved unacceptable findings for the submitted source, binary, and parser surfaces

external_evidence_still_required.authority: EMVCo, recognized laboratory, scheme, or acquirer as applicable
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: signed conformance statement template or approval package tied to the claimed scope
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: template version, signer, signature date, submitted binary hash, ABI version, RTM version, and device/profile scope
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: signed template agrees with the ABI JSON statement, RTM, lab manifest, and approval artifact

external_evidence_still_required.authority: recognized laboratory, scheme, acquirer, or accepted test-tool owner
external_evidence_still_required.required_attachment: full masked APDU traces for every applicable lab/test-tool case
external_evidence_still_required.required_metadata: case IDs, ordering, SW1/SW2, expected and actual outcomes, trace identity, profile SHA-256, ABI version, and masking policy
external_evidence_still_required.acceptance_gate: trace pack is replayable, masked, complete for the claimed test plan, and tied to the submitted binary/profile set
